shipping.trackingInfo: After shipping, you will receive a tracking number via email.

cookie.title: 🍪 Cookie Notice
cookie.description: We use cookies to provide you with the best experience on our website. Essential cookies are required for basic functionality. For more information, see our Privacy Policy.

homepage.heroTitle: Personalized Gifts & Signage for Your Business
homepage.heroSubtitle: From unique gifts to professional signage – Kubikart crafts your product with laser, 3D printing, and vinyl.
homepage.servicesTitle: What can we create for you?
homepage.servicesIntro: Personalized products for individuals and professional solutions for small businesses.
homepage.cat_gifts_text: Keychains, wood engravings, wedding signs, name signs, and more.
homepage.cat_signage_text: QR/NFC review stands, window lettering, door stickers, and signage.
homepage.cat_menus_text: Laminated menus, price lists, QR menu stands, and price boards.
homepage.cat_custom_text: Individual ideas made real – one-offs and small batches to your specifications.
homepage.bizText: We help small businesses in Ulm and the surrounding area look professional – with QR signs, window stickers, menus, and custom branding.
homepage.biz_qr_text: Google Review stands and QR menus for more visibility.
homepage.biz_stickers_text: Opening hours, logos, and social media handles.
homepage.biz_menus_text: Laminated menus, price boards, and table stands.
homepage.biz_starter_text: Complete bundle with NFC sign, stickers, and signage.
homepage.howSubtitle: Choose your product, personalize it, and let Kubikart create something unique for you.
homepage.step1_text: Browse ready-made brand kits, personalized gifts, and custom-made products.
homepage.step2_text: Add names, colors, logos, or details to make the product truly yours.
homepage.step3_text: Your design is carefully prepared, produced, and checked before delivery.
homepage.step4_text: Get your finished product ready to use, gift, or showcase.
homepage.aboutText: Kubikart combines modern technology with handcrafted attention to detail. Personalized gifts and professional signage – individually made for personal and business customers.
homepage.ctaTitle: Have a project? We'll make it.
homepage.ctaText: One-offs and small batches for individuals and businesses – from idea to finished product.
homepage.ctaNote: Perfect for gifts, signage, decor, prototypes, and small batches.

shopPage.heroSubtitle: Discover unique products from wood, acrylic, and 3D printing – personalized, creative, and crafted with care in Germany.
shopPage.emptyText: We couldn't find products matching your selection. Try removing some filters or request a custom product.
shopPage.ctaTitle: Didn't find what you're looking for?
shopPage.ctaText: Many products can be customized. If you have your own idea, a logo, a different size, or a special material in mind, just reach out.
shopPage.trust_custom_text: Many products are personalized to your wishes.
shopPage.trust_precision_text: Laser engraving, laser cutting, and 3D printing precisely combined.
shopPage.trust_support_text: Contact us directly with questions or special requests.
shopPage.trust_packaging_text: Your order is securely and neatly prepared for shipping.
shopPage.faq1_a: Yes, many products can be personalized with names, text, colors, engravings, or special details. Available options are shown on each product page.
shopPage.faq2_a: Production time depends on the product. Many personalized products are crafted within a few business days. See the product page for specifics.
shopPage.faq3_q: Can I request a custom design?
shopPage.faq3_a: Yes, through our custom order process you can submit your own ideas, logos, sizes, or materials. We'll check what's technically feasible.
shopPage.faq4_a: Depending on the product, we work with wood, acrylic, 3D printing materials, paracord, and other components.
shopPage.faq5_q: Are there products for businesses or local shops?
shopPage.faq5_a: Yes, Kubikart also produces NFC stands, QR code signs, acrylic signs, small batches, and custom promotional items for businesses.
shopPage.faq6_q: Can I ask a question before ordering?
shopPage.faq6_a: Yes, you can reach us anytime through the contact page to ask questions or submit special requests.
shopPage.seoTitle: Personalized Products from Wood, Acrylic & 3D Printing
shopPage.seoText1: In the Kubikart Shop you'll find personalized products, gift ideas, and custom creations made from wood, acrylic, and 3D printing. Many items can be customized with names, engravings, colors, or special details.
shopPage.seoText2: Beyond ready-made products, Kubikart also offers custom manufacturing. If you have your own idea, want a logo engraved, or need a product in a different size or style, you can submit a request anytime.

productPage.formSubtitle: Enter your details. Required fields help us ensure a clean result.
productPage.addedToCart: {name} has been added to your cart.
productPage.step1_text: Select your desired product and check which details are needed for personalization.
productPage.step2_text: Enter names, colors, links, or other details directly in the form.
productPage.step3_text: Kubikart carefully implements your specifications and coordinates special requests directly with you.
productPage.step4_text: After production, your product is carefully packaged and reliably shipped.
productPage.ctaText: Need a different size, material, company branding, or a completely custom solution for {name}? Drop Kubikart a short message about your plan. We'll check what's possible and get back to you personally.
productPage.personalizationFallback1: Personalization details are captured directly with your order.
productPage.personalizationFallback2: If you need a different version, you can send Kubikart a custom request anytime.
productPage.genericSubtitle: {productName} individually crafted by Kubikart. Personalized, high-quality, and perfect for {categoryName}.
productPage.genericSeoDescription: {productName} individually crafted. Personalize details and order directly from Kubikart or submit a custom request.
productPage.priceNote: Plus shipping. Individually crafted after ordering.
productPage.shippingNote: Carefully packaged and reliably shipped within Germany.
productPage.benefit1_text: Each product is assembled only after your order and tailored to your specifications.
productPage.benefit2_text: Perfect for birthdays, first day of school, Christmas, or as a thoughtful token with real meaning.
productPage.benefit3_text: Durable materials, clean workmanship, and harmonious color coordination create a premium impression.
productPage.benefit4_text: For special requests or questions, you can reach Kubikart directly to coordinate your product together.
productPage.faq1_question: Can I choose the name freely?
productPage.faq1_answer: Yes. You can specify your desired text. For very long names, we will check feasibility individually.
productPage.faq2_answer: Usually 2 to 4 business days. After that, the product is carefully packaged and shipped.
productPage.faq3_question: Can I request a different color or size?
productPage.faq3_answer: Yes. Use the special requests field or the custom order link directly on the product page.
productPage.faq4_question: Is each product one of a kind?
productPage.faq4_answer: Yes. Since each piece is individually crafted after ordering, every combination is a unique personal item.
productPage.faq5_question: Can I have the product sent as a gift?
productPage.faq5_answer: Yes. If you have a note about packaging or the occasion, you can add it in the special requests field.
